texto: The one piece of advice I always give is this: become a foster parent because you want to help the child. Not because you expect the child to think of you as their mother or father. Or to love you for the rest of their lives. They might never love you. But you have to do the very best you can for them at all times, no matter what. Fostering is one of the few jobs where your ultimate goal is not to be needed anymore.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Rio Hogarty sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “The one piece of advice I always give is this: become a foster parent because you want to help th…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, children, foster-care, útil em momentos de foster-care.
